tagged_types.name: Parser_Handler_Type
tagged_types.code: type Parser_Handler_Type is abstract tagged private;

subprograms.name: Add_Key_Value

documentation.description: Call back to handle the definition of a key/value pair.

subprograms.name: Duplicate_Key

documentation.description: Call back used to report a duplicate key error.
Get the number of error encountered during the parsing of a file.
Return the number of messages parsed.

subprograms.name: Increment_Errors

documentation.description:
Increment the number of errors associated with the properies files
parsed.

subprograms.name: Invalid_Character

documentation.description:
Call back used to report an invalid character, non-ISO-646, in the
source properties file.

subprograms.name: Invalid_Definition

documentation.description: Call back used to report an invalid definition.

subprograms.name: Parse

documentation.description: Same as Parse but on an already open file handle.

subprograms.name: Parse

documentation.description: Same as Parse but on an already open file handle.

subprograms.name: Parse

documentation.description: Parse a properties file using the calling back via the Handler.

subprograms.name: Parse

documentation.description:
Parse a properties file using the calling back via the Handler to
process message definitions and errors (see the abstract methods
above).
Reset the number of messages parse (used when re-using a parser).
